task_completion.description: Verify that exactly five audio tracks with the specified names have been created in the Ardour session.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the editor or mixer window in Ardour. You should see exactly five tracks named 'Kick Drum', 'Bass Guitar', 'Electric Guitar L', 'Electric Guitar R', and 'Lead Vocal'.

task_completion.description: Verify the pan, gain, and mute settings for the 'Kick Drum' and 'Bass Guitar' tracks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the mixer strips: The 'Kick Drum' pan knob should be centered, the fader at -3 dB, and the Mute (M) button inactive. The 'Bass Guitar' pan knob should be centered, the fader at -6 dB, and the Mute (M) button inactive.

task_completion.description: Verify the pan, gain, and mute settings for the 'Electric Guitar L' and 'Electric Guitar R' tracks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the mixer strips: 'Electric Guitar L' pan knob turned hard left, fader at -9 dB, and Mute (M) button active/highlighted. 'Electric Guitar R' pan knob turned hard right, fader at -9 dB, and Mute (M) button active/highlighted.

task_completion.description: Verify the pan, gain, and mute settings for the 'Lead Vocal' track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the mixer strip: The 'Lead Vocal' pan knob should be centered, the fader at 0 dB, and the Mute (M) button inactive.

task_completion.description: Verify that a location marker named 'Verse 1' has been added to the session timeline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the ruler/timeline area at the top of the Ardour editor window. There should be a visible marker flag labeled 'Verse 1'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the session is named 'MyProject' and has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Ardour application title bar. It should display the project name 'MyProject' and ideally show no unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk next to the name), or the history/menu should show a recent save action.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Ardour GUI to configure the session.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Ardour interface with open menus, active mixer windows, or cursor interactions, rather than a text editor modifying the Ardour XML session file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Ardour application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual elements (faders, knobs, timeline, buttons) must match the standard Ardour digital audio workstation UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show scripts or commands being executed to automatically generate the Ardour session file or inject the track configurations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task requires configuring an Ardour session with exactly 5 tracks. Track names and settings: 'Kick Drum' (Pan: Center/0.5, Gain: -3.0 dB, Mute: false), 'Bass Guitar' (Pan: Center/0.5, Gain: -6.0 dB, Mute: false), 'Electric Guitar L' (Pan: Hard Left/0.0, Gain: -9.0 dB, Mute: true), 'Electric Guitar R' (Pan: Hard Right/1.0, Gain: -9.0 dB, Mute: true), 'Lead Vocal' (Pan: Center/0.5, Gain: 0.0 dB, Mute: false). A timeline marker containing 'Verse 1' must be present. The session must be saved.
